## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content creation, review processes, and image generation for Biologica's website and marketing materials.](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Email copy review nearing completion; will be shared with growthx.ai team for brand writing guidelines integration](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Content review process being refined; Nancy to review latest article revisions upon return](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Image generation pipeline updates: no-text versions in progress; aspect ratio specifications needed](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Shopify publishing mechanism in development by growthx.ai team](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Topics

### Content Review and Revision Process

  - [Maggie completing email copy review, expected tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Nancy to review latest article revisions upon return from cruise](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [growthx.ai team to use tabs in Google Docs for version control, including dates for easy reference](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Content OS used primarily for publish-ready content and assignments](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

### Image Generation Updates

  - [New pipelines created for image generation without text](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Current test images are thumbnails; higher resolution versions needed](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Aspect ratio specifications required from Biologica team](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Two image types planned:](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
    1.  Website images without logo or article name
    2.  Shareable images with logo and potentially article title for open graph tags

### Technical Updates and Workflows

  - [Google Docs preferred over Notion due to length limitations](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Cloud app experiencing issues with recognizing some Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [growthx.ai team to deliver artifacts in Google Doc format for easier integration](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Repetition in content being addressed to balance SEO and readability](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Shopify Integration

  - [Publishing mechanism for Shopify in development by growthx.ai team](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [Manual publishing available until automated pipeline is complete](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)

## Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai to deliver Google Doc versions of artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Brian to provide aspect ratio specifications for image generation](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [growthx.ai to create and share test images in higher resolution](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [growthx.ai to develop spec for website and shareable image versions](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Continue content delivery to build Biologica's content library](https://fathom.video/share/oTyyCkvVGvtMpNUrBwbtChSiavmvZj4b?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
